matches.summary:
Nexon reported strong first-quarter results, with net income rising 118% year-over-year, supported by a ¥14.5 billion ($91.4 million) foreign exchange gain.

Read more
matches.title: Nexon Q1 net income rises 118% to $360.7m

matches.summary: Square Enix has reported financial results for the year ending March 31, 2026, noting a decline in net sales due to reduced revenues from MMOs and games for smart devices and PC browsers.
matches.title: Square Enix FY26 operating income surges 34.9% despite net sales decline

matches.summary: Former NetEase executive Simon Zhu has launched a new holding company, GreaterThan Group (GTG), securing $40 million in funding and approximately $60 million in additional commitments.
matches.title: New AAA collective to publish Star Wars: Fate of the Old Republic plus games from CoD and Yu-Gi-Oh! veterans

matches.summary: Capcom has reported increased profits across all divisions for the ninth consecutive year, driven by its core digital contents segment – particularly Resident Evil Requiem and strong catalogue sales within the franchise.
matches.title: Capcom secures ninth consecutive year of profit boosted by Resident Evil Requiem

matches.summary:
Indika developer Odd Meter has secured $5 million in a funding round led by Gem Capital and Autotelic Ventures.

Read more
matches.title: Indika dev Odd Meter raises $5m to fund next project

matches.summary:
"I've pretty much recouped a living salary".

Sektori, the ridiculously good spiritual successor to Geometry Wars, has now launched on the Switch 2, and according to its solo developer Kimmo Lahtinen, the port has proven to be a big success.

As reported by
matches.title: Sektori's Switch 2 Launch Has Proven A Huge Success For Its Solo Developer

note: Items flagged for manual review. No automatic fact emission.
